papers.title: Gemini 1.5: Unlocking multimodal understanding across millions of tokens of context
papers.summary: Mixture-of-experts model with up to 1M-token context, capable of reasoning over hours of video, large code repos, or entire books in a single prompt.

insurance_business_case.headline: Eliminates the chunking gymnastics for long-document insurance use cases: full policy contracts, claim files, and reinsurance treaties go in whole.
points: Group benefits underwriting: ingest a 400-page RFP, census, and prior carrier experience in one shot — produces gap analysis and pricing memo.
Litigation triage: read the full claim file (FNOL → SOAP notes → IME → demand letter) and surface inconsistencies.
Producer training: load the entire product guide + objection handling + compliance disclosure and ask scenario questions.

technical_details.pattern: Long-context LLM as a 'reasoning surface' over case files, with RAG as the precision retrieval layer.
points: Hybrid: RAG narrows to the relevant case file; long-context model reasons across it without further chunking.
Token-cost controls: cap per-case context, cache prior turns with Vertex AI context caching.
PII redaction at ingestion; per-tenant CMEK encryption for jurisdictional data residency.
Eval: needle-in-haystack tests using synthetic clauses planted in real contracts.

papers.title: Med-PaLM 2: Towards Expert-Level Medical Question Answering
papers.summary: Medical-domain LLM that scored expert-level on USMLE-style questions through instruction tuning and ensemble refinement on physician-rated data.

insurance_business_case.headline: Foundation for clinically-grounded medical underwriting and disability claims adjudication.
points: Life underwriting: interprets APS / lab values for impairment classification consistent with manual underwriting guidelines.
Disability/LTC claims: assesses functional capacity from clinician notes, reducing nurse-reviewer queue time.
Group health stop-loss: triages high-cost claimants from medical narratives for early case management.

technical_details.pattern: Domain-adapted LLM with physician-in-the-loop evaluation, deployed behind a clinical-decision-support wrapper.
points: Wrap with structured output schema mapped to underwriting manual codes (e.g., Swiss Re Life Guide).
HITL: every adverse decision routed to a medical director with model rationale + source quotes.
FDA / Health Canada SaMD classification analysis before any 'diagnostic' use.
Bias eval across age/sex/ancestry on historical decisions before deployment.

papers.title: AlphaCode 2: Competitive Code Generation with Gemini
papers.summary: Generation-and-search pipeline that produces, tests, and ranks thousands of candidate programs to solve competitive programming problems above the 85th percentile of human coders.

insurance_business_case.headline: Blueprint for a 'rules-as-code' modernization engine that converts legacy COBOL/PL/I underwriting rules into testable Java / Python services.
points: Accelerates mainframe modernization of policy admin & rating engines — a multi-year cost-out program at most life carriers.
Generates Drools / DMN rule files from the actuarial pricing manuals automatically.
Self-tests via generated unit tests against captured production traffic for behavioural parity.

technical_details.pattern: Generate-many-then-test pipeline with execution sandbox and learned ranker.
points: Capture replay corpus: 100k anonymized (input, output) pairs from the legacy rating engine.
Generate N candidate implementations; auto-run in container sandbox against the corpus.
Rank by (pass rate, latency, cyclomatic complexity); keep top-K for human review.
Promote behind a shadow-traffic gate with automated regression on every release.

papers.title: TimesFM: A Decoder-Only Foundation Model for Time-Series Forecasting
papers.summary: Pre-trained 200M-parameter decoder-only model that zero-shot-forecasts unseen time series at accuracy near supervised baselines.

insurance_business_case.headline: Replaces dozens of bespoke ARIMA/Prophet models across actuarial and finance with one model that handles new lines of business out-of-the-box.
points: Lapse and surrender forecasting for ALM and capital projections.
Claims frequency / severity nowcasting for IBNR reserving by LOB and geography.
Premium-cashflow forecasting for treasury and liquidity planning.

technical_details.pattern: Foundation TS model + light per-series fine-tune, integrated into the actuarial modelling pipeline.
points: Serve via Vertex AI online prediction; offline backfill via batch.
Couple with conformal prediction for calibrated confidence intervals (regulator-friendly).
Champion/challenger vs incumbent Prophet/SARIMA on monthly closing run.
Lineage tracked in feature store (Feast/Vertex Feature Store) for SOX audit.

papers.title: PaLI-3: A Smaller, Faster, Stronger Vision-Language Model
papers.summary: 5B-parameter vision-language model that matches or beats 10× larger competitors on document VQA and image captioning.

insurance_business_case.headline: Cost-effective engine for the document-and-image deluge of insurance: paper applications, ID, voided cheques, accident photos, property damage.
points: Auto-NIGO on paper applications by reading and validating field-by-field at submission.
Auto-property assessment from roof photos for home content / hospital indemnity rider validation.
Beneficiary form scrutiny: detects altered amounts, mismatched signatures.

technical_details.pattern: VLM as the document understanding layer, with structured-output extraction and human review queue.
points: Pipeline: ingestion → VLM extraction (JSON schema) → business validators → STP or NIGO queue.
Confidence thresholds per field; below threshold = workflow event for human.
Bias / fairness eval on signature / handwriting recognition across demographics.
Edge deployment for branch / agency scanners via TFLite or ONNX.
